name: Multiple companies at site, who pays for forklift accident?
description: Employer comp + sue others (contractors, owners) for more.

mainEntity.name: Multiple companies at site, who pays for forklift accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: Employer comp + sue others (contractors, owners) for more.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Your employer's comp first; sue negligent third-parties like other contractors.** Apportion fault.[5][7] Key factors: Labor laws hold site owners liable for safety. Evidence IDs responsible. Max recovery via suit.
